overview: EveryMoment is a mobile-first web app for capturing, organizing, and sharing event-centric memories. Users create Moments (weddings, parties, milestones) where media, people, and interactions are organized together, with robust access control for both public and private experiences.
features: Create and manage public or private Moments with UUID sharing
Calendar view with day/week/30-day toggle showing own and followed users' moments
Memories tab — conversation-style media and message feed for attending users
Event Pass QR modal for RSVP'd users
Editable profile with dynamic payment details
Advanced Explore filters with Near Me location search
Modern share modal with copy link and collapsible QR
Admin dashboard with CSV bulk import
